function.name: convert_time_between_locations
function.description: Convert time between two named locations (cities, countries, etc.).
function.long_description: Resolves city or location names to their official IANA timezones and converts a specific date/time between them, automatically accounting for Daylight Saving Time.
example_user_queries: If it's 10:00 AM in Kolkata, what time is it in Dubai?
Convert 2026-06-01 14:00 from New York to Paris.
What time is it in Tokyo when it's 8 PM in Los Angeles?
Time difference between Sydney and Mumbai for tomorrow at noon.
When it is midnight on New Year's Eve in Sydney, what time will it be in London?
Convert 2026-08-15 09:30 from Chicago time to Singapore.
I have a meeting at 3 PM in Berlin; what time should my colleague in San Francisco log in?
If a flight leaves Dubai at 2026-11-20 22:00, what is the local time in Kolkata at that exact moment?
What will be the local time in Johannesburg if I set my clock to 10:00 in Toronto on March 25th?
